name: SATCOM Agent Context Packet
purpose: URL-first documentation, prompt, and endpoint map for Hermes and Open WebUI when local filesystem access is unavailable.

localEndpoints.name: Open WebUI Login
localEndpoints.purpose: Local Open WebUI login for Hermes Kit Build Mode, model selection, file upload, and knowledge-base management.
localEndpoints.notes: Use this when the browser needs to authenticate before opening Hermes Codex.

localEndpoints.name: Hermes Codex Knowledge Base
localEndpoints.purpose: Open WebUI knowledge base currently loaded with curated SATCOM/Hermes docs.

localEndpoints.name: Aileen / Hermes WebUI
localEndpoints.purpose: Human operator dashboard for prompts, chat continuity, and local model routing.
localEndpoints.notes: Canonical Hermes entrypoint when running locally.

localEndpoints.name: Hermes Agent Diagnostics
localEndpoints.purpose: Raw sessions, analytics, models, logs, skills, plugins, profiles, config, and keys.
localEndpoints.notes: Diagnostics only. Direct /api calls can return 401 without an embedded dashboard session.

localEndpoints.name: Hermes Crew Bridge
localEndpoints.purpose: Local chat, crew run/status/result API, Qwen/Ollama routing.
localEndpoints.notes: Use for local crew jobs after the bridge is healthy.

localEndpoints.name: OpenAI-Compatible Local Gateway
localEndpoints.purpose: Base URL for Open WebUI or API clients.
localEndpoints.notes: Verified local model id in SATCOM docs: ollama-qwen.

localEndpoints.name: Kanban Ops
localEndpoints.purpose: Local Planka/Kanban board for operator work.

localEndpoints.name: API Vault Bridge (macOS)
localEndpoints.purpose: Local guarded one-key request bridge health check.
localEndpoints.notes: Reports bulk_export_allowed=false and key_values_returned_by_default=false. Missing keys.enc is a safe degraded state.

localEndpoints.name: API Vault Bridge (Open WebUI container)
localEndpoints.purpose: Container-reachable API Vault tool base URL for Open WebUI when Open WebUI is containerized.
localEndpoints.notes: Current local uvx Open WebUI can use the macOS bridge URL. Use this host.docker.internal URL only from inside a container.

sourceDocs.role: Paste into Hermes or Open WebUI to establish scope and guardrails.

sourceDocs.title: Idaho Springs CRM Integration Packet
sourceDocs.role: Staged CRM-ready packet for Idaho Springs corridor kits; review only, no SMS/email sends or production CRM writes without operator approval.

sourceDocs.title: Hermes Command Packet
sourceDocs.role: CoNews buildout mission, subagent model, and progress hooks.

sourceDocs.title: Hermes Execution Policy
sourceDocs.role: Allowed work, hard review hooks, and stop conditions.

sourceDocs.title: Hermes / Claude Shared Handoff
sourceDocs.role: Roles, current local URLs, and credential handoff rule.

sourceDocs.title: SATCOM Handoff Summary
sourceDocs.role: Current rollout state and recommended implementation sequence.

sourceDocs.title: SATCOM Progress Monitor
sourceDocs.role: Deployed sprint evidence, active blockers, and restore points.

sourceDocs.title: Deploy Hooks
sourceDocs.role: Static Vercel dashboard validation and smoke checks.

sourceDocs.title: Kit Generator Prompt
sourceDocs.role: Bulk ShopLocal campaign kit generation instructions.

openWebUi.importMode: Prefer URL import. If URL import is unavailable, paste the markdown prompt and add the manifest URL as a source note.

hermes.mode: docs-first suggest-mode unless Codex/operator explicitly approves execution

safety.credentialRule: One named key, one task, one reason. Never bulk export credentials to Hermes, Open WebUI, prompts, Git, browser session config, or model config.
hardReviewHooks: secrets, tokens, private keys, .env, or credential handling
DNS, Plesk, SSL, firewall, or domain changes
Sendy, live email sends, 3CX live SMS/voice, or external contact
billing, Stripe, bank, invoice, subscription, or Microsoft 365 account changes
production deploys unless explicitly approved by the operator
allowedWithoutStopping: markdown, JSON, CSV, and dashboard data artifacts
